steps.t: Meligrien has asked you to look for her child, Celethon. She suspects he can be found by the beach near Linhir. Talk to Celethon.
You have collected enough seashells. Talk to Celethon on the beach near Linhir.
You have secured a promise from Celethon to return home. It's time to tell Meligrien. Talk to Meligrien in Linhir.
